name: Wide Crossroads
description: A junction or intersection point, figures at a decision space.
hld_patterns: {setting}. A crossroads — paths converging, figures at the junction.
{setting}. An intersection of routes, figures distributed at the meeting point.
{setting}. A decision point in the landscape, figures arrivals from different directions.

1: {subject}, center, at the intersection, small in frame.

background_pool: A rural crossroads where two dirt roads meet at a weathered wooden signpost, oak trees casting dappled shade at the junction, overgrown hedgerows lining the lanes, wildflowers in the verge, rolling farmland visible down each path under a soft afternoon sky

A desert intersection of trails marked by a cairn of stacked stones, the paths branching across cracked earth in different directions, distant mesas visible along each route, heat haze distorting the air, a single twisted juniper providing the only shade

A medieval town square where three streets converge on a central well, half-timbered buildings leaning overhead, cobblestones worn smooth, market stalls pushed to the edges, a stone cross on a plinth marking the center point

A mountain pass junction where switchbacks branch in different directions, a rusted iron marker post at the fork, scree slopes and alpine grass surrounding the paths, peaks visible down each route, wind-bent pines clinging to the rocks
action_pool: looking down each path in turn
gesturing down one of the routes
standing at the marker, reading it
pausing with one foot on the path, hesitating
turning to face a different direction
removing a pack to sit at the junction
pointing out a feature on the horizon
conferring with a companion, both facing the fork
